title: Villagers With Names
description: Gives all villagers a name to enhance your world !
body:
- **✨ Easy to use**
- **🛠 Configurable !** - **➕ Over 10000 names !** - **🛜 Supports Name Parser API !** - **📦 Supports ProtocolLib !** **Villagers With Names** gives all villagers a name. This will name existing ones and news in the world. This plugin contains a list of 10000+ names. The profession of the villager is visible when trading with him. You're free to edit the name list in the plugin datafolder. ![A screenshot of a farmer villager named Loan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SbGHNzYA/images/c702b070787d79a8083564a22dfb81d9db932e09.png) ![The inventory of a farmer named Loan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SbGHNzYA/images/7996ae5031d9796461e4ca8a709139d55baaa23f.png) ## Configuration `gender` can be MALE to have only male names, FEMALE for having only female names, or BOTH to have... both `interface-name` is what's shown above the villager "experience bar", %n is for his name and %p for his profession. `api.type` is when using an external API, like NameParser. You'll have to put the corresponding name of the supported API, eg: Name Parser become NAMEPARSER `api.key` is simply for the API key (when required) `api.country-code` is for, when supported, the specific country to pick names from on the API `illager-prefix` adds a prefix to the illagers. You can do things like "Evil [NAME]" `bstats` enable or not anonymous statistics
